author: tEc5
content: Completed env-var unification across crossbridge-protocol/-supervisor/-server/-client, plus the new crossbridge-e2e workspace crate with submit_then_answer_round_trip and helpers. 91 workspace tests pass, clippy + fmt clean, commit 588ca1a. The e2e test is marked #[ignore] pending #18 (pre-existing client xb-ref labeling bug surfaced by the test); per kickoff constraint, the bug was filed separately and not fixed in-band.
